name: HMS ML 174 (ML 174)
events: 18 Jan 1944 HMS Unseen (Lt. M.L.C. Crawford, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Gibraltar for Portsmouth. She was escorted until 1330/20 by ML 174 (T/Lt. R. Mayhew, RNVR) and ML 176 (T/A/Lt.Cdr. G.O. Sparks, RCNVR).
For the daily positions of HMS Unseen during this passage see the map below.
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
